Jacob Thompson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated and motivated professional with extensive experience in retail management and customer service. Strong communication skills and a keen ability to lead teams. Seeking to transition into a new field and bring my leadership abilities to a dynamic work environment.

Experience
Store Manager  
Best Buy, Atlanta, GA  
March 2020 - Present  
- Oversaw daily operations of a retail store, ensuring sales targets were met and customer satisfaction was achieved.  
- Managed a team of 15 staff members, providing training and coaching to improve performance.  
- Implemented inventory management strategies to reduce excess stock and improve turnover rates.  

Sales Associate  
Target, Atlanta, GA  
June 2017 - February 2020  
- Assisted customers with product selection and inquiries in a fast-paced retail environment.  
- Maintained store appearance and organized merchandise displays to enhance customer experience.  
- Collaborated with team members to achieve sales goals and improve overall store performance.
